'''The Arch''' was one of the major skyways found within the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Efavan/Legends|Efavan]], [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]]. It circled the [[Old Bronzan]] district of the city, and carried passengers from the [[Farain Skyway]] to other parts of the city.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
